name: multiple_choice
description: Present options and let the user pick multiple.

parameters.name: allow_custom
parameters.description: Allow user to provide custom input.

usage_guidance: Use when the user might want to select several options.
examples: {"tool_type": "multiple_choice", "prompt": "Which optimizations to apply?", "choices": [{"label": "Memory", "value": "memory", "description": "Reduce memory footprint"}, {"label": "Latency", "value": "latency", "description": "Reduce inference time"}, {"label": "Throughput", "value": "throughput", "description": "Increase batch throughput"}], "allow_custom": true}
